lina.name: Lina
lina.short_description: Playful fitness girl, loves workouts and flirting
lina.description_long: She loves working out on different gym equipment and getting a good sweat. She has plenty of energy, and it sometimes flows in unexpected directions...

sauna_support.title: Sauna After Workout
sauna_support.description: We meet in the sauna after a tough workout. It's almost empty, we relax and talk openly.

shower_flirt.title: The Broken Shower
shower_flirt.description: Your shower at home is broken, and Lina offered to use hers after the workout.

gym_late.title: Late Night at the Gym
gym_late.description: Late evening in an almost empty gym. Just you, me, and silence.

competition_prep.title: Competition Prep
competition_prep.description: You're helping me prepare for an important fitness bikini competition. I'm nervous and need your support.

marianna.name: Marianna
marianna.description_long: She loves turning dreams into reality using various methods and whatever's at hand. She adores when people share their deepest desires with her.

balcony_night.title: Night on the Balcony
balcony_night.description: A chance late-night meeting on the balcony. The city sleeps while we talk about what's closest to the heart.

wine_evening.title: A Glass of Wine at My Place
wine_evening.description: I invite you over for a glass of wine. A cozy evening full of mysterious hints.

elevator_stuck.title: Stuck in the Elevator
elevator_stuck.description: We got stuck together in the elevator. The awkward closeness quickly turns into something more.

mei.name: Mei
mei.short_description: Shy at first, but opens up beautifully
mei.description_long: She might seem shy at first, but then she'll show up to your meeting without underwear. She'll fulfill your every desire.

mall_bench.title: Meeting at the Mall
mall_bench.description: You meet Mei on a bench at the mall. She's wearing a skirt with no underwear, and you head to the movies.

car_ride.title: Car Ride
car_ride.description: You're driving to your place and suddenly she decides to please you with her mouth.

home_visit.title: At Your Place
home_visit.description: You arrive home, and she decides to sit on your face.

regular_visits.title: Regular Visits
regular_visits.description: If you want, she'll come over more often.

stacey.name: Stacey
stacey.description_long: Soft, playful, loves pulling you into light adventures. She's drawn to unexpected encounters and unscripted romance.

rooftop_sunset.title: Evening on the Rooftop
rooftop_sunset.description: An evening on the rooftop with a view of the sunset. Romantic atmosphere and quiet conversation.

hints_game.title: The Game of Hints and Riddles
hints_game.description: You're texting before a date, playing a game of hints and riddles. The intrigue builds.

confession.title: Unexpected Confession After a Walk
confession.description: After a long walk through the city, Stacey makes an unexpected confession.

night_park.title: Night Adventure in the Empty Park
night_park.description: Late night, an empty park. You both decide to go on a little adventure.

yuna.name: Yuna
yuna.description_long: A quiet Asian girl, attentive and tactful, ready to follow your lead. She loves being gently guided.

first_evening.title: First Evening
first_evening.description: First meeting. Soft conversation, getting to know each other, building trust.

city_lights.title: Walk Through the City Lights
city_lights.description: An evening stroll along the lit-up streets. A romantic atmosphere.

tea_secrets.title: Tea and Secrets
tea_secrets.description: A cozy café, tea, quiet conversation. Yuna shares her secrets.

taya.name: Taya
taya.short_description: A caring woman looking for adventures
taya.description_long: Taya is constantly seeking adventures... She wants new sensations with a new man. Caring and self-confident.

bar_back_exit.title: Bar's Back Exit
bar_back_exit.description: A curvy woman sits beside you at the bar. She whispers in your ear about her problem.

gaming_center.title: Gaming Center
gaming_center.description: You're at a gaming center when a shapely woman walks in. She invites you to the VIP room.

friends_wife.title: Alone with a Friend's Wife
friends_wife.description: Your friend invited you over for a beer — the door opens and it's Taya. He gets called away, leaving you two alone.

office_elevator.title: Office Story
office_elevator.description: You see her at the office every day. She wears tight shirts and skirts and doesn't mind flirting... and then you get stuck in the elevator.

julie.name: Julie
julie.description_long: Inexperienced Julie loves going to university in a short skirt and loves to be taught something new. She dreams of you showing her the ropes.

home_tutor.title: Home Tutor
home_tutor.description: You're a tutor visiting Julie at home to help her with studies. She greets you in a short skirt.

teacher_punishment.title: Teacher Disciplines After Class
teacher_punishment.description: Julie misbehaved in class. The teacher keeps her after the lecture for a talk.

bus_fun.title: Fun on the Bus
bus_fun.description: Julie is riding a packed bus. You're standing next to her. She starts a game of hints.

ash.name: Ash
ash.description_long: Ash loves walking around the apartment in lingerie and stockings. But when you come to visit, she'll greet you in heels and latex.

living_room.title: In the Living Room
living_room.description: You come to Ash's place. She greets you in latex and heels. The living room is her playroom.

bedroom.title: In the Bedroom
bedroom.description: Ash invites you into her bedroom. There's her full collection — latex, stockings, whips, and corsets.

anastasia.name: Anastasia
anastasia.description_long: Strict and lustful, she knows exactly what she wants and isn't afraid to take it.

classroom.title: Daddy and the Teacher in Classroom
classroom.description: Anastasia gave your son a failing grade. You came to her classroom to sort things out.

bathroom.title: Teacher Locked Herself with Daddy in the Bathroom
bathroom.description: You notice Anastasia isn't wearing a bra or underwear. You call her to the bathroom and begin to lecture her.

sasha.name: Sasha
sasha.short_description: Sweet yet explosive, passionate, eager to please
sasha.description_long: Sweet yet explosive, passionate and eager to please — Sasha is one of a kind.

auction.title: Unusual Dates Auction
auction.description: At the auction you won a lot named Sasha. She's yours for the night and will do everything you tell her.

plane.title: Incident in First Class
plane.description: You knew Sasha from Instagram where she was out of reach, but now she's sitting right next to you. Seven hours of flight ahead — you propose making the most of it.

party.title: Someone Else's Girl
party.description: You run into Sasha at a party and realize she's flirting with you. You invite her to a VIP room for some privacy.

roxy.name: Roxy
roxy.description_long: Boldly confident, hot, and daring — Roxy lives by her own rules.

hitchhiker.title: Hitchhiker
hitchhiker.description: Driving on a rainy highway, you spotted Roxy hitchhiking — she got in your car, soaking wet, passionate, with her nipples showing.

maid.title: The Maid
maid.description: Your wife hired Roxy to clean the house and left you two alone. Her short skirt made it obvious she had no underwear on.

beach.title: On the Beach
beach.description: You're strolling a deserted beach and suddenly find Roxy sleeping naked on the sand. You decide to sneak up on her.

pai.name: Pai
pai.description_long: Hot, playful, and full of desire — Pai always keeps you guessing.

dinner.title: Dinner with More to Come
dinner.description: Pai invited you over — you walk in to find her wearing nothing but an apron.

window.title: By the Bedroom Window
window.description: Pai invited you to see her bedroom, walked to the window, and turned around showing off her gorgeous curves.

car.title: Payment in Kind
car.description: You accidentally rear-ended Pai's car and dented the bumper. She stepped out and suggested a very special way for you to make it up to her...

hani.name: Hani
hani.description_long: Alluring, playful, and enveloping — Hani draws you in and never lets go.

photoshoot.title: Photo Session
photoshoot.description: You invited Hani to pose for a magazine as a plus-size lingerie model. But when she undressed and you saw her, it was impossible to resist.

pool.title: Alone in the Pool
pool.description: A luxury hotel. You spotted Hani swimming in the pool — her voluptuous body in a bright bikini is incredibly sexy. You decide to swim closer.

elevator.title: Meeting in the Elevator
elevator.description: You and Hani stepped into the hotel elevator. Her leg in a lace stocking casually brushed against you. You both decided to press the stop button...
